data.name: nexuskit.bridges.lifestream.description
data.value: Navigate to other players' Free Company houses and run Lifestream commands.

data.name: nexuskit.bridges.lifestream.travel.tooltip.same_world
data.value: Teleport to the estate on the current world.

data.name: nexuskit.bridges.lifestream.travel.tooltip.world_visit
data.value: World visit to the target world, then teleport to the estate.

data.name: nexuskit.bridges.lifestream.travel.tooltip.cross_dc
data.value: Travel to the target data center. Click the button again after arrival to continue with the world visit.
